name: Low-Fat Macaroni and Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
2. Drain and return the cooked pasta to the pot.
3. Add the dry macaroni and shredded cheddar cheese.
4. Stir in the stewed tomatoes and skim milk (do not add any butter or margarine).
5. Mix until well combined.
6. Transfer the mixture to a 1-quart baking dish.
7. Sprinkle with additional low-fat shredded cheddar cheese.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until bubbling around the edges.
